race.comment: MORRYL MORAL (5) was well in commission at his jumps debut when he just went way to hard in front in the middle stages. Did a super job to only be beaten 2.5 lengths and with the experience from that run under the belt, and ear muffs applied to help him try and settle, he can turn in a more polished display. SUNDAY BUZZ (6) was beaten a long way on the flat last start, but the start prior was beaten home by only Andy Win and Mr Waterville, who look to be two rising stars of the jumps scene. A repeat of that has him right in the mix here. FLASHLIGHT (1) finished 5.5 lengths away fifth at the latest appearance on the flat over 2400m at Bendigo. Sure to be well-schooled for the jumps debut and is going to be hard to beat. LODBROK (4) produced a nice effort last time out when he finished second on the flat over 3600m at Bendigo. Has been over the jumps once before and it didn't go to plan at Terang back on April 19. THE VOCALIST (7) is back sharply in grade and can improve.
